metaTitle: Unity Gate | Next-Gen Social & Psychological Platform
metaDescription: Access secure online therapy, expert matchmaking, and mediation services with Unity Gate.
heroSubtitle: Discover yourself against the invisible crisis of the modern age. Understand why you feel lonely, match with the right expert via AI, and draw your recovery route today.
visionDesc: Unity Gate stands as an unshakable fortress of trust in digital matchmaking and professional consulting. Our vision is to spread corporate standards that guarantee sincerity and security globally.
bento1Desc: Measure your loneliness level with scientific data. Let our AI algorithm map your clinical consulting route.
bento2Desc: We protect your mental health with international clinical standards. A secure, science-based approach.
bento3Desc: All your calls are end-to-end encrypted (E2EE). Your data is always safe with us.
process1Desc: Meet people who share your vision in interest rooms.
process2Desc: Socialize in military-encrypted groups guided by experts.
process3Desc: Overcome loneliness with collective consciousness and empathy.
process4Desc: Unity Gate is always with you. Coming soon to App Store and Google Play.
